meta.title: Royce Gracie Jiu-Jitsu — Gracie Combatives
meta.source: Gracie Combatives (36 essential techniques / 23 classes), the foundational self-defense curriculum of Royce Gracie Jiu-Jitsu.
meta.note: Official class calendars rotate which two techniques pair per class, but the 36 core techniques are stable. Videos are verified, embeddable YouTube links from Gracie-lineage instructors; 34 of the 36 techniques have one (the Rear Takedown and Double Underhook Pass are still pending a verified video).
